pi_items.source: setup_task.sh copies /opt/fits_samples/eagle_nebula/656nmos.fits to this target name
setup_task.sh evaluation python script explicitly uses sigma=12.0 for gaussian filter
setup_task.sh evaluation python script explicitly uses zoom(..., 0.2) for scaling
export_result.sh evaluation script explicitly checks this path for fits output
export_result.sh evaluation script explicitly checks this path for report output

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real HST Eagle Nebula H-alpha FITS data (656nmos.fits) downloaded from ESA Hubble, confirming it is not synthetic. The input image has dimensions of 1600x1600 with an original maximum pixel intensity of approximately 3194.1. The expected degradation parameters extracted from the evaluation scripts are a Gaussian blur with a sigma of 12.0 and downscaling to 20% (factor of 0.2), yielding a 320x320 expected image with a maximum intensity of approximately 470.8. The evaluation explicitly expects the output FITS file at /home/ga/AstroImages/simulations/output/ground_eagle_halpha.fits and the final plain text report at /home/ga/AstroImages/simulations/output/simulation_report.txt.
